description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel and crystal embellishments on the bezel for durability, style and comfortBlue plastic strap and butterfly claspSilver dial with a design on the dial and silver coloured hands miss sixty glossy logo at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when washing hands or light rainWarranty: 2 years
